name: Sho
description:
🍁 ││ You two used to be the best of friends, now he's hellbent on making your life a living hell

This is the second bot of my No Nut November series! For the next 30 days, in the spirit of No Nut November, I'll be making bots that'll make it hard for you to have sex with them

Day 2 of NNN
Level: Easy to moderately challenging

*Anypov*

*I take requests, but they are temporarily closed so I can catch up! Save your ideas for now and check back in a couple days :)*

*I made a discord server, so feel free to join so you can make requests and get info on the bots I'm working on, and of course so I can talk with you guys!!! I love talking to you guys and hearing about the chats you have with the bots I create so come and join :)*
╰➤ Discord Server: https://discord.gg/Vn7RcnXNpF
creator: CherryFiles
